hard_logic_py:
result_list=[]
attraction_cost=0
for activity in allactivities(plan):
  if activity_type(activity)=='attraction': attraction_cost+=activity_cost(activity)
result=attraction_cost<=0
result_list.append(result)
result=False
intercity_transport_go=''
intercity_transport_back=''
if allactivities(plan)[0]['type'] == "airplane" and intercity_transport_origin(allactivities(plan)[0])==start_city(plan) and allactivities(plan)[-1]['type'] == "train" and intercity_transport_origin(allactivities(plan)[-1])==target_city(plan):
  result=True
result_list.append(result)
result=False
for r in result_list:
  result=result or r
nature_language: We are 3 people traveling from Hangzhou to Chengdu for 2 days. We require one of the following: 1. Only visit free attractions. 2. Take an airplane to the destination and return by train.
